name: Roy Toussaint
subtitle: the retired lion-tamer at the lot

ultimate_ability.label: The Gentle Hand
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Every visitor on the board this turn advances one step toward connection at no time cost. Roy's hand on the flank of a thing that could hurt him and doesn't.

notes: Roy's hand for the Strength arcana. STRAIN is the second stat (starts at 6, kills at max). Scenarios: lion_cage_open (canonical), dawn_at_the_wagon (easier), storm_after_storm (hardest).
